title: Diamethyst Golem
description: Adds a golem to the Diamethysts mod.
body:
This is an official add-on to the Diamethysts mod. The Diamethysts mod is a required dependency and this mod will not work without it.


This mod adds a living, breathing (maybe), larger than life golem made of pure diamethyst. The golem is fast, strong, robust, and healthy. Adding one to a village will provide an extra layer of protection from raids and other threats. Unfortunately, villagers do not have access to the materials needed to make them so they will not spawn naturally. To create a golem, place blocks of diamethyst in the same pattern as when making an iron golem. Add a carved pumpkin or jack-o-lantern for a head and the golem will be born. Diamethyst golems will occasionally offer a diamethyst cluster. When that happens, you can right click on the golem with an empty hand had he will drop the cluster for you. As the golem becomes damaged, his face will change and cracks will begin to appear. You can heal golems by right clicking on them with diamethyst crystals or shards.


Features:

  • Fast and powerful golems made of diamethyst.
  • Fully configurable speed, attack damage, health, knock back resistance, and friendliness to their creators.
  • Gift giving in the form of Diamethyst Clusters that are dropped when right clicked with an empty hand.
  • Ability to heal golems with diamethyst crystals or shards.
  • Full support for automated creation via dispensers.


A diamethyst golem patrolling a village.

A diamethyst golem offering a diamethyst cluster.

Language Support:

  • US English
  • Simplified Chinese (provided by junshengxie)
  • Traditional Chinese (provided by junshengxie)

Other Diamethysts Add-ons:

More Diamethyst Arrow upgrades.


Adds a selection of medieval weapons.


Adds support for Diamethysts in the Treasure2 mod (1.20.1 only).


Check out my other mods:

Rebuild the long forgotten mystical tomes of ages past.


This mod is for Forge only. I do not have plans to port to Fabric at this time.


Modpack developers: You are welcome to include Diamethyst Golem in your modpack, just don't forget the Diamethysts! dependency. If you are making it public, please give me appropriate credit for my mod.
